description: Style Note Perfect for those casual outings, these suede and leather sandals from red tape are all that you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort. Pair them with your favourite casual pants, shorts or jeans and make a fashion statement! Product Details Leather and suede straps covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and style A leather loop on the upper middle holding the straps in place Ankle strap in leather and suede to lock the foot in place All straps have a fabric inner lining and are padded to protect the feet from blistering and to offer breathable comfort Velcro midfoot strap for a customised Fit Footbed made of suede in the toe region and in a horse-shoe shape in the ankle region, with the remainder made of suede for absolute breathable comfort and style Footbed stitched to the midsole for durability Durable rubber outsole, curved at the midfoot and forefoot to offer absolute ergonomic comfort Textured outsole with leaf midrib pattern lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
